# Bows
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Bows&prop=wikitext

This page includes both custom bows and old bows that have been edited from how they appear on the predicting RotMG server.
{| class="article-table"
!Bows
!Damage
!Range
!RoF
!Shots
!Stats
!Pierce
!Armor Pierce
!Obstacle Pierce
!Fame Bonus
!Tier
!Legendary/Primal Effects
|-
|Bow of Mystical Energy 
|85-115
|7.52
|
|2
|
|yes
|
|
|5%
|T13
|
|-
|Bow of Deep Enchantment
|95-125
|7.52
|
|2
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|T14
|
|-
|Galaxy Longbow
|115-135
|7.52
|
|2
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|GL
|
|-
|Heavy Bow of the Asgard Guardian
|1350-1650
|9
|11%
|
|
|yes
|
|
|5%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Hallow's End 
|205-255
|8.01
|66%
|
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|Unique
|
|-
|Metal Blood Bow
|135-165
|7.5
|75%
|
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Bow of the Lightning God
|100-130
|5
|80%
|2
|
|
|
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Greeni
|105-130
|6.51
|120%
|2
|
|
|
|
|0%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Wooden Elegence 
|65-95
|7.77
|115%
|2
|
|yes
|yes
|
|5%
|Artifact
|
|-
|Undead's Gross Bow
|85-120
|7.04
|85%
|5
|
|yes
|yes
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Last Hope
|-
|Handcannon
|100-125
|12
|95%
|8
|
|yes
|
|
|0%
|Legendary
|Angel's Touch
|-
|Coral Bow
|60-85
|6.11
|140%
|3
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|Heroic
|
|-
|Bow of the Void
|290-350
|6.23
|
|
|
|yes
|
|
|6%
|Legendary
|Physical Barrier
|}
